title: Muscarella helenae
intro: Muscarella helenae, also known as Helen's orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to Costa Rica. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects that can aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as wound healing and infections. The bioactive constituents of Muscarella helenae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its health benefits for topical and internal applications.
